# Chosen Holistic Services

> Holistic products and community shuttle service based in Nipawin, Saskatchewan, plus glass and handyman work from a long-time glazier.

Chosen Holistic Services carries supplements, vitamins, and natural cleaning products chosen for quality and purity, and runs a shuttle service connecting Nipawin, Melfort, Tisdale, White Fox, Love, and Carrot River to Prince Albert and Saskatoon. Owner Tim Peters, a glazier of 35 years, also offers glass, window, and general handyman repairs. The business is owned and run by Tammy and Tim, based at 301-1st Ave. E, Nipawin, SK S0E 1E0, Canada.

## Pages

- [Home](https://chosenholisticservices.com/index.html): Overview of all services and the "Chosen to Serve" story.
- [About](https://chosenholisticservices.com/about.html): Tammy and Tim's story and the mission behind the business.
- [Services](https://chosenholisticservices.com/services.html): Details on holistic products, shuttle routes and booking, and glass & handyman work.
- [Contact](https://chosenholisticservices.com/contact.html): Phone, email, address, and a contact form for inquiries or shuttle bookings.

## Contact
